name: FuzeAgent agent-orchestrator
description: Accepts a delegated goal and runs a managed Claude agent to accomplish it, returning the outcome and any artifacts. FuzeAgent selects and dispatches the appropriate managed-agent role, drives it to completion (pausing for human approval on always_ask/production actions), and hands the result back — the caller needs no agent-runtime knowledge, tools, or credentials of its own.

examples: Run an agent to triage the failing CI on this PR and open a fix branch.
Spawn a research agent to compare the options for X and return a recommendation with sources.
Orchestrate a multi-step refactor: plan it, execute it on a branch, and report the resulting PR.
Dispatch an agent to draft the release notes for the latest changes and return them.
